---
title: "Mildred’s Last Night, or, The Franklyns By the Author of Aggesden Vicarage"
---

## Mildred’s Last Night, or, The Franklyns By the Author of Aggesden Vicarage

**Author:** Ann Maria Carter Smith
**Date:** 1863
**Imprint:** London: Bell and Daldy

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
